0.text: Several subcentimeter calcific nodules in both lungs

1.text: Largest nodule measuring up to 5 mm in the anterior segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Largest nodule measuring up to 5 mm in the posterior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Emphysematous changes in the upper lobes of both lungs

4.text: Emphysematous changes in the paracardiac area on the left

5.text: Nonspecific pleural thickening in the upper lobe of the right lung
